    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cook(String item, Gamepanel gp)
    Constructor for the Cook class, initializes the cook time based on the item being cooked and the player's cook level, as well as the inventory indices for the food and its ingredients

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canCook()
    Checks if the player has the necessary ingredients to cook the item
    void
    startCooking()
    Uses the canCook() method to check if the player has the ingredients needed to cook the item, if so it starts a new thread to handle the cooking process, simulates cooking using the thread sleep method and updates player inventory, adds the food and removes the ingredients.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cook

      public Cook(String item, Gamepanel gp)
      Constructor for the Cook class, initializes the cook time based on the item being cooked and the player's cook level, as well as the inventory indices for the food and its ingredients
      Parameters:
      item - the name of the item to be cooked, used to determine cook time and ingredients indexes
      gp - the Gamepanel instance, used to access the player's inventory and display messages

  • Method Details

    • startCooking

      public void startCooking()
      Uses the canCook() method to check if the player has the ingredients needed to cook the item, if so it starts a new thread to handle the cooking process, simulates cooking using the thread sleep method and updates player inventory, adds the food and removes the ingredients. If the player doesn't have the necessary ingredients, it shows a message to the player indicating that they cannot cook the item. The warnig suppression is used to ignore the warning about busy waiting, since Thread.sleep is used to simulate the cooking time without freezing the main game thread.

    • canCook

      public boolean canCook()
      Checks if the player has the necessary ingredients to cook the item
      Returns:
      true if the player has all required ingredients, false otherwise
